footer.tagline: A collaborative, free and open database of food products

homepage.title: Score My Recipe - Open Food Facts
homepage.badge: The open-source tool for environmental assessment of recipes
homepage.hero_title: Calculate the environmental impact of your recipes
homepage.hero_description: Come with your existing recipes. Our tool adapts to what you have and instantly calculates the Green-Score and helps you move towards more sustainable menus.
homepage.section2_title: Works for home and professional kitchens
homepage.section2_description: Beyond single recipes, easily score many recipes with reliable data.
homepage.feature1_description: Easily adjust a recipe's impact by "jamming" on quantities or testing ingredient substitutions on the fly.
homepage.feature2_title: A transparent methodology grounded in PEF/Agribalyse
homepage.feature2_description: A transparent calculation methodology, based on the rigor of the public PEF/Agribalyse database carried by ADEME.
homepage.feature3_description: Rely on a validated indicator already identified by millions of consumers on Open Food Facts and Yuka.
homepage.footer_text: An open-source project led by Open Food Facts, designed to help us reduce the impact of at-home cooking, out of home dining and catering.
homepage.footer_badge: Project carried out collaboratively thanks to the support of ADEME's Call for Commons
homepage.footer_github_link: Contribute to the project on GitHub
